description: §41.16.1 — tableFor's for= must be a :struct type. An enum type fires E-TABLEFOR-TYPE-NOT-STRUCT.
rationale: §41.16.1: for= SHALL be a bare scrml-native :struct type identifier; enum/named-shape/refinement/generic/arbitrary type expressions are rejected with E-TABLEFOR-TYPE-NOT-STRUCT (mirrors formFor/schemaFor).
